description: CompositionGreen T-shirt made 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print across the chest and embroidered brand logo on the back neckFittingRegularWash careWash and iron inside outMachine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach or tumble dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft cotton fabric, this T-shirt from puma is designed to offer exemplary comfort, while the graphic print on the front oozes sporty attitude.
